title: Mahallada Duv-duv Gap
actors: Gani Agzamov, Nazira Alieva, Seifi Alimov
plot: In one of the quarters of the old part of Tashkent "Mahalla", in the adobe houses opposite the large new building there live the families of builders: the mason with his wife and daughter Sayyera, old Mehrihon, whose son Azimdzhan...
